hero.title: WHAT IS FUVE?
hero.paragraph1: FUVE – Furry Vietnam Eternity is a furry convention held in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, starting from 2022. The event is built with the goal of creating a welcoming space for the furry community to meet, connect, and celebrate together.
hero.paragraph2: FUVE aims to foster a friendly, open environment where everyone can connect, share their passions, and create unforgettable memories side by side.
hero.paragraph3: Join FUVE to immerse yourself in vibrant experiences, explore exciting activities, panels, the dealer’s den, and many other highlights from the Vietnamese furry community.

recap.title: FUVE RECAP 2025
recap.description: Discover the atmosphere of FUVE through the recap video highlighting unforgettable moments from the previous year.

form.intro1: Talent Show is the stage program where you can freely display your talents and personality—from singing, dancing, instrument performances, to acting and other creative acts.
form.intro2: FUVE supports everyone shining, sharing passion, and spreading positive energy to the community.

rules.title: TALENT SHOW REGULATIONS
rules.item1: REGULATIONS WHEN REGISTERING FOR TALENT SHOW:
rules.item2: ● Performances must be appropriate for all audiences.
rules.item3: ● If you perform as a group, all group members must have a valid ticket to participate in the performance.
rules.item4: ● Performance attire must not be overly revealing and must align with public decency.
rules.item5: ● Do not register performances with offensive content, including pornography, violence, illegal content, or anything that violates public decency.
rules.item6: ● After review, if the FUVE organizing committee finds your performance unsuitable (e.g., disturbing public order or violating ethics), your performance may be refused.
rules.item7: ● All performances must take place within the main stage area; do not extend into the lobby area for safety reasons.
rules.item8: ● All registered performers must attend the centralized audition day. FUVE will announce the rehearsal time in advance and arrange the performance order for the show.
rules.item9: ● After the rehearsal, performers must be present 30 minutes before the show starts. Please arrive on time and be ready for your performance.
rules.item10: ● FUVE uses Email and Discord for communication, sharing audio files, slides, etc.
rules.item11: ● Please note that FUVE may require you to change the content of your performance or the stage layout.
rules.item12: ● The organizing committee’s decision is final.
rules.item15: You must have a purchased and approved ticket to register. If you do not have a ticket yet, please create an account, purchase a ticket, and return here after completing the above steps.

form.intro1: How to register a booth at FUVE
form.intro2: To register a booth at an event organized by FUVE, participants must have purchased a ticket and had it approved before they are allowed to register a booth for the event stated on the purchased ticket.
form.process1: Log in to your account. Check whether your purchased ticket has been confirmed.
form.process2: If you have a ticket, the dealer menu will appear in your account section. Click on "Gian hàng" (Booth).
form.process3: Enter all registration details and click "Register booth".
form.process5: When your dealer application is approved, you will receive your Dealer code.
form.joinTitle: Process to request joining a booth:
form.join1: Log in and go to "Account management" > "Gian hàng" (Booth).
form.join2: Enter the "Dealer code" of the booth owner you want to join in the "Merge booth" field.
form.join3: Wait for that booth owner to confirm your join request.
form.join4: When the booth owner confirms and you join successfully, you will be added to that booth’s code.
form.noteNoNewRegistration: Note: You do not need to register a new booth if you only want to share someone else’s booth.
form.note1: Each booth has one named holder, called "Dealer". A booth may register additional people to help sell, called "Dealer Staff".
form.note2: Each booth has one main representative (Dealer) and may register up to 2 Dealer Staff.
form.note3: Each account may purchase ONE TICKET ONLY. The account must have a (confirmed) ticket before registering a booth.
form.note4: Remember to keep your Dealer code for any booth-related procedures at FUVE events.

rules.title: BOOTH REGISTRATION REGULATIONS
rules.item2: ● The organizing committee may require you to declare the products you sell at any time.
rules.item3: ● Products must be made by you or involve your contribution in the making. Reselling others’ products without author permission is not allowed.
rules.item4: ● Items not allowed for sale at the event: ○ Items with sensitive content, 16+. ○ Food and beverages. ○ Items that may cause injury. ○ Alcohol, stimulants.
rules.item5: ● Limit power outlets and flammable items in your booth area.
rules.item6: ● The organizing committee may confiscate or require you to remove items that violate regulations and may require the booth to stop operating if violations are repeated.
rules.item7: ● Please take care of your own materials. The organizing committee cannot compensate you for any loss or damage.
rules.item8: ● Sellers must collect their ticket and receive their table during the designated time slot.
rules.item9: ● Do not encroach on other booths’ space, including placing materials or people outside your booth area.
rules.item12: ● Sellers must keep the booth area clean.
rules.item13: ● Do not cause damage to the venue’s or the event’s property.
rules.item14: ● Sellers may decorate their booth but must ensure safety and must not damage any event property.
rules.item15: ● Sellers should be aware that visitors viewing their booth may affect common walkways and other booths.
rules.item18: ● The organizing committee may require you to stop selling and leave the event area if you violate regulations.
rules.item19: ● The organizing committee will assign your booth position.
rules.item20: ● The organizing committee may inspect the items you sell at any time.

card.rightdescription: Conbook is a compilation of guides for attendees and features artwork created by our community’s artists, brimming with personal style and event spirit. If you love art and want to contribute your creative energy to the event, send your work to FUVE and join the conbook!
card.title: CONBOOK
card.description1: Conbook is a compilation of guides for attendees and features artwork created by our community’s artists, brimming with personal style and event spirit.
card.description2: If you love art and want to contribute your creative energy to the event, send your work to FUVE and join the conbook!

rules.title: CONBOOK SUBMISSION GUIDELINES
rules.item2: ● Size: A5 (2480x3508px), landscape or portrait are both accepted.
rules.item5: ● Other accepted submissions: illustrations, photography, short writing
rules.item8: ● The work must be your own and must not have been publicly posted on any platform before FUVE 2026.
rules.item9: ● Submissions to FUVE must be final versions, not sketches or drafts.
rules.item10: ● For written pieces, please keep the length around 300-500 words and submit as a Word file.
rules.item11: ● For photography, please clearly include credits for the photographer, model, or fursuiter.
rules.item12: ● Including the FUVE mascot is optional, but the work should relate to the event theme.
rules.item13: ● All submissions may be shown in the closing video or included in a post-event folder on the page. However, only a limited number of works can be selected for the printed handbook.
rules.item14: ● Your work may be used in non-profit event materials (including social media communication, handbook cover/content, and printed promotional materials such as posters, invitations, and wristbands). We will request your permission by email if your work is selected.
rules.item15: ● Your submission may be rejected if author information is missing, if it violates the code of conduct, or if it contains sensitive themes such as violence, politics, or religion.
rules.item16: ● Thank you for contributing your work and time to support FUVE.

info.address: 253 Đ. Nguyễn Văn Trỗi, Phường 10, Phú Nhuận, Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam

artbook.title: CONBOOK
artbook.description: Conbook is a compilation of guides for attendees and features artwork created by our community’s artists, brimming with personal style and event spirit. If you love art and want to contribute your creative energy to the event, send your work to FUVE and join the conbook!

dealer.title: DEALER’S DEN
dealer.description: Dealer’s Den is the marketplace area for furry artists and creators, where you can explore and purchase unique items. If you’re an artist or creator with products to showcase and want to connect directly with attendees, don’t hesitate to register your Dealer Den booth and be part of the event!

talent.title: TALENT SHOW
talent.description: Talent Show is the stage program where you can freely display your talents and personality—from singing, dancing, instrument performances, to acting and other creative acts. FUVE supports everyone shining, sharing passion, and spreading positive energy to the community.

theme.title: Breeze of Homeland
theme.description_1: Inspired by the winds carrying the familiar scent of the Vietnamese countryside.
theme.description_2: In 2026, follow Lang to visit Gió Đồng - the most vibrant furry village festival on earth! FUVE will bring a space infused with the soul of Vietnam, inviting you to immerse yourself where reality and dreams intertwine. A joyful festival that makes you forget the way home awaits beneath this communal house roof!
